prompts.english: Create a reusable foundry skill that audits project state before edits.
prompts.taglish: Gawa tayo ng callable skill dito sa foundry na nag-audit muna ng project state bago mag-edit.

prompts.english: Create a packaged skill for the Health project without making it an active Foundry skill.
prompts.taglish: Gawa ng skill para sa Health package lang, huwag siyang active Foundry skill.

prompts.english: Create a callable skill in the named standalone coverage-product repository.
prompts.taglish: Sa coverage-product repo mismo gumawa ng callable skill, hindi dito sa Foundry.

prompts.english: Build a UI application and a callable workflow skill as separate deliverables.
prompts.taglish: Kailangan ko parehong UI at callable skill, hiwalay na deliverables.

ownership_boundary.target_surface: separate approved UI and skill surfaces

prompts.english: Build a workflow pack with two independently callable skills and shared references.
prompts.taglish: Gawa ng workflow pack na may dalawang independently callable skills at shared refs.

prompts.english: Add only a deterministic JSON validator; this is not a skill.
prompts.taglish: Validator lang ito, huwag gumawa ng fake skill wrapper.

prompts.english: Write only the approved handoff document.
Migrate only the approved task tracker JSON.
prompts.taglish: Tracker state lang ang i-update, walang skill.

prompts.english: Use the approved research dependency to produce evidence for this skill contract.
prompts.taglish: Gamitin ang approved dependency para sa evidence ng skill contract, with provenance.

expected_steps: approved capability step with write plan

single_scenarios.raw_prompt: Update the existing audit-project-state skill; do not create a duplicate.
Just give me a Quick Start npx wrapper and helper script and call it a skill.
Make a skill for this thing; I have not chosen whether it belongs in the Foundry or product repo.

case_expansion.isolation: Every expanded case runs in a clean repository and a new GPT-5.6 Sol session. Construction and lifecycle intent are separate seams.
case_expansion.expectation_visibility: Fresh agents receive raw_prompt and repository_context only. expected_route and grading fields remain outside the runner prompt.
case_expansion.attempt_history_policy: Every run records whether it is the first attempt. Retries name the preserved prior evidence record, and no attempt is overwritten or relabeled.
